name: io.github.ShieldCubed/agentic-pay
title: agentic-pay
description: Non-custodial payment engine for AI agents — BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, XRP, XMR, ZEC.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTIC_PAY_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Identifier for this agent, used to look up its spend-limit policy in config.json.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTIC_PAY_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your config.json (spend limits, API keys, static prices). Defaults to config/config.json in the install directory.

environmentVariables.name: BTC_WIF
environmentVariables.description: WIF-encoded Bitcoin private key for the funding wallet. Only required if using the BTC rail.

environmentVariables.name: ETH_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: EVM JSON-RPC endpoint URL. Only required if using the ETH/USDT/USDC rails.

environmentVariables.name: ETH_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed Ethereum private key for the funding wallet. Only required if using the ETH/USDT/USDC rails.
